---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "fix: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Select ...
3. See ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots or recordings

If applicable, paste a screenshot or screen recording here.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 127, Safari 17)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node -v`)
- **npm version:** (run `npm -v`)
- **App version / commit:** (run `git rev-parse --short HEAD`)

## Question ID (if applicable)

If the bug is related to a specific question, include its ID. Question IDs are shown in the URL
during a quiz session (e.g. `metrics-042`).

## Additional context

Anything else that might be useful: console errors, network tab output, etc.
